whatsNew: Unified the guided assignment journey across every course.
Opening an assignment now resumes its exact current workflow stage.
Supporting evidence in progress reopens the selected TA, PA or WT route.
Ready, downloaded and uploaded assignments open the correct evidence screen.
RPL assignments skip directly to the next non-RPL assignment.
Added automatic migration for existing learner progress and workflow records.
Updated offline caching so the final integrated build replaces earlier phases.
